label: Primary caller restriction uses OpenCode agent mode classification
summary: council is mode all, councillor is hidden subagent, normal specialists are subagent, orchestrator is primary.

label: Schema has no caller or restricted-to fields
summary: Agent override schema exposes model/skills/mcps/prompt/display fields and rejects additional properties; no caller/dispatcher restriction field exists.

label: Delegation rules are declared but appear unused
summary: SUBAGENT_DELEGATION_RULES maps orchestrator to all orchestratable agents and others to none, but grep found no usage outside constants.

label: Task-tool denial is observed post hoc by retry hook
summary: The hook detects output containing 'is not allowed. Allowed agents:' and labels it background_agent_not_allowed, implying denial comes from the task/runtime layer.

label: council_session has plugin-owned caller guard
summary: The custom council_session tool checks toolContext.agent and throws unless the caller is council.

label: council_session permission is allowed only for council
summary: applyDefaultPermissions allows council_session only for the council agent and denies it for all others.

label: Councillor sessions disable task tool
summary: CouncilManager creates child sessions with parentID and prompts councillors with tools.task=false.

label: Depth control allows bounded nesting, not strict LEAF depth-1
summary: SubagentDepthTracker blocks only when max depth is exceeded; default max depth is 3.

label: Skills are filtered per current agent before model call
summary: The available_skills transform infers current agent from message info and rewrites the skill block to allowed entries.

label: Default skill policy is orchestrator-open and specialist-restricted
summary: getSkillPermissionsForAgent grants wildcard skill access only to orchestrator by default and grants specific skills to allowed agents.

label: Write-capable safety is prompt-led for fixer
summary: Fixer is instructed to execute scoped specs, read before edits, avoid research/delegation, and validate when applicable; no hard write-scope guard surfaced.

label: Session management is orchestrator-scoped only
summary: Task session management runs only for sessions mapped to orchestrator and docs state manual @agent calls are unaffected.

label: No env-var caller marker found
summary: Caller restriction evidence centered on SDK mode, permission maps, toolContext.agent for council_session, and task-tool errors; no env-var mechanism surfaced.

label: Schema-level caller restrictions
summary: Agent schema rejects additional properties and does not define caller/restricted/dispatcher fields.

label: General orchestrator-only enforcement likely resides in OpenCode core
summary: The plugin detects runtime denial text but does not appear to originate that denial for ordinary task delegation.
